name: anta-lead-radar
description: ANTA Lead Radar - AI-powered lead generation and outreach intelligence platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:signal"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../signal-engine && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
